units.lean_file_body:
variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K]
variable {n : ℕ}

theorem det_transpose' (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) : Aᵀ.det = A.det :=
by
  simpa using Matrix.det_transpose A
notes: Added variable commands for K and n to provide CommRing and Fintype instances.

units.lean_file_body:
variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K]
variable {n : ℕ}
open Matrix

theorem det_triangular (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular id) : A.det = ∏ i, A i i :=
  Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular h

theorem det_triangular_lower (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular (OrderDual.toDual ∘ id)) : A.det = ∏ i, A i i :=
  Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular A h
notes: Added second theorem det_triangular_lower to cover the lower triangular case using Matrix.det_of_lowerTriangular.

units.lean_file_body:
variable {K : Type*} [CommRing K]
variable {n : ℕ}
open Matrix

theorem det_permute_rows (τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) :
    (A.submatrix τ id).det = ((Equiv.Perm.sign τ : ℤ) : K) * A.det :=
  Matrix.det_permute τ A

theorem det_permute_cols (τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) :
    (A.submatrix id τ).det = ((Equiv.Perm.sign τ : ℤ) : K) * A.det :=
  Matrix.det_permute' τ A
notes: No repair needed; the theorems compile.
